case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA OFELIA AGUILAR CABRERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA GONZALEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA OFELIA AGUILAR CABRERA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,474.66 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, MARIA OFELIA AGUILAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED JUN-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, MARIA OFELIA AGUILAR
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
